languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

languages.text: "Замечу, что этот тезис верен не только для тебя. Для меня и Нунциуса странствие бок о бок с эльдаром тоже служит источником Познания, который не иссякнет даже в случае твоей гибели".

"I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."
languages.original_text: "Замечу, что этот тезис верен не только для тебя. Для меня и Нунциуса странствие бок о бок с эльдаром тоже служит источником Познания, который не иссякнет даже в случае твоей гибели".

traits.locale_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

"I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

"I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

languages.text: «Quiero hacer constar que esa tesis no solo se aplica a ti. Para Nuncius y para mí, viajar en compañía de una Aeldari también será una fuente de conocimiento que seguirá siendo inagotable aunque perezcas durante el proceso».
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: «Quiero hacer constar que esa tesis no solo se aplica a ti. Para Nuncius y para mí, viajar en compañía de una Aeldari también será una fuente de conocimiento que seguirá siendo inagotable aunque perezcas durante el proceso».

languages.text: 「この論題があなたにとってのみ真であるわけではないことを、指摘しておきます。私とヌンキウスにとっても、アエルダリと轡を並べて旅することは、たとえあなたが死を迎えたとしても尽きることのない、知識の源泉なのです」
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: 「この論題があなたにとってのみ真であるわけではないことを、指摘しておきます。私とヌンキウスにとっても、アエルダリと轡を並べて旅することは、たとえあなたが死を迎えたとしても尽きることのない、知識の源泉なのです」

languages.text: “这一论点不仅适用于你。于我和努恩修斯而言，与一位艾达灵族同行也会为我们带来知识的源泉，而这源泉即使在你死后也不会枯竭。”
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: “这一论点不仅适用于你。于我和努恩修斯而言，与一位艾达灵族同行也会为我们带来知识的源泉，而这源泉即使在你死后也不会枯竭。”

languages.text: "Ich weise darauf hin, dass diese These nicht nur für Euch gilt. Für Nuncius und mich, die wir Seite an Seite mit einem Aeldari reisen, ist sie auch ein Quell des Wissens, dir auch nach Eurem Ableben unerschöpflich bleiben wird."
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weise darauf hin, dass diese These nicht nur für Euch gilt. Für Nuncius und mich, die wir Seite an Seite mit einem Aeldari reisen, ist sie auch ein Quell des Wissens, dir auch nach Eurem Ableben unerschöpflich bleiben wird."

languages.text: « Je note que cette thèse n'est pas uniquement vraie pour vous. Pour Nuncius et moi, voyager aux côtés d'un Aeldari est également une source de connaissances inépuisables, même si vous deviez trépasser. »
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: « Je note que cette thèse n'est pas uniquement vraie pour vous. Pour Nuncius et moi, voyager aux côtés d'un Aeldari est également une source de connaissances inépuisables, même si vous deviez trépasser. »

languages.text: "Bu tezin sadece senin için geçerli olmadığını not ediyorum. Nuncius ve benim için de bir Aeldari ile yan yana seyahat etmek, ölümün durumunda bile tükenmez kalacak bir irfan kaynağıdır."
languages.original_text: "I note that this thesis is not only true for you. For myself and Nuncius, travelling side by side with an Aeldari is also a source of knowledge that will remain inexhaustible even in the event of your demise."

traits.locale_text: "Bu tezin sadece senin için geçerli olmadığını not ediyorum. Nuncius ve benim için de bir Aeldari ile yan yana seyahat etmek, ölümün durumunda bile tükenmez kalacak bir irfan kaynağıdır."
